subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the Abhá Beauty! Letter number fifty-three hath reached Me, and from its contents it became evident that His Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان جمال ابهی نامه نمرو ۵۳ رسید و از مضمون معلوم گردید که حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
